title: BFDI Edition
body:
BFDI Edition this is awesome, There are some things I'm going to add from this texture pack

can be BFDI, BFDIA, BFB, TPOT and more.

Cake It looks like the BFDI cake, the cake is pink, it has parts of white and red![Cake Texture New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da49ce749e9ec46618c07f44207cfd2c046648b1.png)
![This is cake!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf6dbc71386a9dbcab725e7d24720157354127e4_0.webp)
